verses.1: We give thanks to you, God.
verses.2: When I choose the appointed time,
verses.3: The earth and all its inhabitants quake.
verses.4: I said to the arrogant, “Don’t boast!”
verses.5: Don’t lift up your horn on high.
verses.6: For neither from the east, nor from the west,
verses.8: For in the LORD’s hand there is a cup,
verses.9: But I will declare this forever:
verses.10: I will cut off all the horns of the wicked,
